Cookie Policy

Last updated: April 2026

What are cookies?

Cookies are small text files that websites store in your browser to remember preferences or to show relevant advertising.

Cookies we use

CookieTypePurposeDuration
cf_currencyOwnRemember your selected currencyPermanent (localStorage)
cf_langOwnRemember your language preferencePermanent (localStorage)
cf_consentOwnStore your cookie decisionPermanent (localStorage)
__gads / IDEGoogle AdSenseShow relevant ads (only if accepted)Up to 13 months

Google AdSense cookies

We use Google AdSense to display ads. Google may use cookies to personalize ads based on your browsing history. See Google's advertising policy and manage preferences at adssettings.google.com.

Manage your preferences

Herramientas online gratuitas para cálculos rápidos.
